chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-317 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 15.09.2025. Mr. Zahid Ali Khoso, Advocate for Petitioners. Mr. Siraj Ahmed Bijarani, Assistant P.G for the State. Mr. Muhammad Yousuf Rahpoto, Assistant A.G Sindh a/w ASI Abdul Razzaque Mallah from PS Kandiaro. Learned A.A.G files comments submitted by Respondent No.4 & 6, which are taken on record. Petitioner No.1 Mst. Paris is present and states that she being sui juris has contracted marriage with Deedar Ali (petitioner No.2) without any pressure, compulsion and coercion, which has caused very much annoyed to her family members who are issuing threats for dire consequences. She further states that she has not been abducted or enticed away by anyone including the petitioner No.2; however, petitioners apprehend that petitioner No.2 and his family members will be booked in malicious false criminal cases at the hands of private respondents. Learned Assistant Advocate General present in Court submits that official respondents shall act strictly in accordance with law and will provide protection to the Petitioners, as and when required. After such statement, learned counsel for Petitioners being satisfied seeks disposal of instant Petition. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of with directions to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law and provide protection to both the petitioners, as and when they needed. Office is directed to transmit a copy of this order to the Senior Superintendent of Police, Shaheed Benazirabad for compliance.

Accordingly, this petition is disposed of with directions to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law and provide protection to both the petitioners, as and when they needed. Office is directed to transmit a copy of this order to the Senior Superintendent of Police, Shaheed Benazirabad for compliance. JUDGE Ali.
